reviews.comment:
El comienzo de un finde largo los baños muy sucios un asco y la cafetería cerrada

(Translated by Google)
The start of a long weekend, the bathrooms were filthy and disgusting, and the cafeteria was closed.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.
Pero no tienen la aplicación de YPF para poder pagar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.

However, they don't have the YPF app for payments.

reviews.comment:
Buen café, buena atención, ideal para hacer un punto de parada, como siempre las estaciones de ACA súper completas, los empleados muy ate tos y correctos, los recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
Good coffee, good service, ideal for a stopover, as always ACA stations are very well-equipped, the employees are very attentive and polite, I recommend them!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURleHNYYld3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños un desastres cero higienicos igual es entendible pasa mucha gente.
Los precios por las nubes del mini mercado se abusan por el turismo que pasa.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are a disaster, completely unhygienic, but that's understandable given how many people pass through.
The prices at the mini-market are outrageous; they're taking advantage of the tourists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlaHI2REdREAE
